revision.comment: Might as well just hide if empty, but still track for repair
1 revision imported: second run of importing xml edited files to get rid of the bad category
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{list1|{{{list|}}}}}}|{{#invoke:navboxes|top}} {{{list1|{{{list|}}}}}}{{#invoke:navboxes|bottom}}|{{main other|}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other| }}|preview=Page using [[Template:Navboxes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| bg | bordercolor | fg | list | list1 | state | title | titlestyle }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Navboxes template with no content]] [[Category:Pages using navboxes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
